analysis.summary: Three medium priority flags identified across three repositories. Two of these relate to the absence of a README.md file, and one is due to a large Python script.
high_priority: TylerBeats/Z_Claw — missing_readme: No README.md at repo root
TylerBeats/agent-network — missing_readme: No README.md at repo root
recommendations: Add a README.md file to the root of each repository for better documentation and clarity.
Refactor or split the large Python script (agents/backtester.py) into smaller, more manageable files.
